prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为15770→16439→16325→18279→19542，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约3217名，2025年基准约19542名；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为51人，2024年减至49人，2025年进一步减至47人；2026年计划大幅扩至58人，较2025年扩招约23.4%，扩招幅度显著，对位 次有较大后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名约第113名，近年排名在99–113之间小幅波动，整体层次稳定；该校在声誉文件 中未见明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第50位，评价为"较热"，短视频曝光量中等，报考关注度一般；第五轮学科评估中该校无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科 未进入全国前列，学科竞争力对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业以计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类、机械类等工科为主，其中计算机类、电子信 息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，报考意愿较强；湖南省2026年物理类考生约347000人，较2025年增加约8.4%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；该校位于辽宁省大连市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；在湖南省招生占比属外省高校正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+23.4%）带来的位次后移压力、物 理类考生增加（+8.4%）带来的竞争加剧、以及工科专业热度较高的综合影响，考虑考生增加和热门专业吸引力的对冲作用，预测2026年最低位 次约22086名，区间21586–22586名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 15770 → 16439 → 16325 → 18279 → 19542, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3217 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 19542 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province Physics Category was 51 from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 49 in 2024, and further reduced to 47 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 58, an increase of about 23.4% compared to 2025, which is a notable expansion and exerts considerable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 113th in the Soft Science main ranking, with slight fluctuations between 99 and 113 in recent years, maintaining a stable overall level. No significant negative public opinion events were found in reputation documents. Douyin popularity ranks 50th, rated as 'relatively hot', with moderate short video exposure and average application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no disciplines rated A- or above, and its advantageous disciplines are not among the top in the country, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly engineering fields such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, and Mechanical Engineering. Among them, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in social popularity, with strong application willingness. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. The university is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, not a local university in Hunan, with no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment proportion in Hunan is at a normal level for out-of-province universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the downward pressure on rankings from the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+23.4%), the intensified competition from the increase in Physics Category candidates (+8.4%), and the high popularity of engineering majors, with the offsetting effects of increased candidates and the appeal of popular majors, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 22086, with a range of 21586–22586.

If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, prioritize reaching for popular majors like Computer Science.
